sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8780" key="a)nqobo/lhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθο-βόλησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n8780.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">putting forth of flowers,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4080.tlg001:59:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
